openFindings.title: description.json still advertises the retired 010 parent node after renumbering
openFindings.summary: The packet's current specFolder lives under 001-search-and-routing-tuning, but parentChain still lists 010-search-and-routing-tuning.

evidence.detail: Current specFolder uses the 001-search-and-routing-tuning path.
parentChain still stores 010-search-and-routing-tuning.
migration.new_spec_folder and local_phase_slug confirm the packet was renumbered to 001.

openFindings.title: plan.md still instructs helper removal even though the shipped packet keeps the compatibility surface
openFindings.summary: The execution plan says remove LENGTH_PENALTY and helper functions, while the implementation summary and runtime exports keep them as no-op compatibility artifacts.

evidence.detail: Approach says the public applyLengthPenalty option stays as a temporary no-op.
Step 1 still says remove LENGTH_PENALTY, calculateLengthPenalty(), and applyLengthPenalty().
Implementation summary says helpers and request path remain as a compatibility surface.
Runtime export surface still includes LENGTH_PENALTY, calculateLengthPenalty, and applyLengthPenalty.

openFindings.title: checklist.md records an unsupported exact verification count
openFindings.summary: The checklist marks the four-suite vitest command as 15 files and 363 tests, which already conflicts with the implementation summary's capture of the same command.

evidence.detail: Checklist claims the targeted four-suite vitest run passed with 15 files and 363 tests.
Implementation summary records the same command as 4 files and 126 tests.

openFindings.title: decision-record frontmatter still reports the packet as planned
openFindings.summary: The decision record remains at status: planned even though the spec packet and implementation summary are both complete.

evidence.detail: Decision record frontmatter still says status: planned.
The spec packet is complete.
Implementation summary describes delivered behavior, not a planned state.

openFindings.title: decision-record consequences still describe the retired lp cache split as active risk
openFindings.summary: The ADR says cache buckets may still split on retired lp bits, but the packet's tasks and implementation summary say that runtime fix already landed.

evidence.detail: Consequences still mention temporarily separate lp cache buckets.
T-06 says generateCacheKey now ignores retired lp bits.
Implementation summary says the retired lp cache-key discriminator was removed.

openFindings.title: implementation-summary.md now carries its own stale exact test count
openFindings.summary: The implementation summary hard-codes the same four-suite vitest command as 126 tests; the packet therefore has two incompatible exact verification claims and no trustworthy canonical capture.

evidence.detail: Implementation summary records the exact targeted verification command as 4 files and 126 tests.
Checklist records the same command as 15 files and 363 tests.

openFindings.title: No-op length-penalty compatibility exports remain public
openFindings.summary: The packet intentionally keeps LENGTH_PENALTY and helper exports alive even though they no longer change runtime behavior, which extends the API and test surface.

evidence.detail: LENGTH_PENALTY constant remains defined with no-op multipliers.
calculateLengthPenalty() and applyLengthPenalty() now return no-op results.
The no-op constant and helpers remain exported.

repeatedFindings.note: Hierarchy drift survived the second traceability pass.
Correctness stabilization confirmed the issue is documentation drift, not runtime behavior.
The stale cache-risk statement remained unresolved at synthesis.
No-op export surface remained advisory-only after the maintainability refresh.

correctness.summary: No behavior bug survived three passes through runtime and test surfaces.

security.summary: Provider resolution, warning paths, and fallback behavior stayed within expected trust boundaries.

traceability.summary: Core packet metadata and verification artifacts drift from the current renamed packet state.

maintainability.summary: Decision-record and compatibility-surface cleanup debt remain open.

spec_code.note: Plan and ADR text no longer reconcile cleanly with the shipped compatibility posture.

checklist_evidence.note: Checklist and implementation-summary exact verification counts diverge.

feature_catalog_code.note: This packet has no feature_catalog surface.

playbook_capability.note: This packet has no playbook surface.
